tasks.subject: Task 1: ScrapeResult dataclass + scraper.scrape_html migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ScrapeResult dataclass to scraper.py and migrate scrape_html to return it (with HTTP status code captured from page.goto).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/scraper.py:263-441
- Create: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_scraper_result.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/scraper.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_scraper_result.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_scraper_result.py tests/test_scraper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ScrapeResult dataclass defined", "scrape_html returns Optional[ScrapeResult]", "response.status captured", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: fetch_html migration to ScrapeResult
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fetch_html returns ScrapeResult | None instead of tuple. Phase 1 retry + Phase 2 variant logic preserved.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/redirect_tracker.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_redirect_tracker_result.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_redirect_tracker_result.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fetch_html returns Optional[ScrapeResult]", "Phase 1 retry preserved", "Phase 2 variant fallback preserved", "routes.py call sites updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add 6 env vars to config.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add INVALID_PAGE_DETECTION_ENABLED, HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_ENABLED, SOFT_404_TITLE_THIN_THRESHOLD, SOFT_404_H1_THIN_THRESHOLD, INVALID_PAGE_TTL_HARD_S, INVALID_PAGE_TTL_SOFT_S to Settings.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/config.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -c \"from app.core.config import settings; print(settings.INVALID_PAGE_DETECTION_ENABLED, settings.HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_ENABLED, settings.SOFT_404_TITLE_THIN_THRESHOLD, settings.SOFT_404_H1_THIN_THRESHOLD, settings.INVALID_PAGE_TTL_HARD_S, settings.INVALID_PAGE_TTL_SOFT_S)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 settings exposed", "defaults match spec", "env override works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: page_validator module + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure validator classifying ScrapeResult against requested URL into VALID / HTTP_ERROR / SOFT_404 / REDIRECTED_TO_HOME.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/page_validator.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_page_validator.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_page_validator.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ValidationVerdict enum", "validate function", "all 14 unit tests pass", "fail-open on parse crash"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add Prometheus metrics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add VALIDATION_VERDICTS (Counter, label=verdict) and HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED (Counter, label=outcome) to metrics.py.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/metrics.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -c \"from app.core.metrics import VALIDATION_VERDICTS, HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED; VALIDATION_VERDICTS.labels(verdict='valid').inc(); HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED.labels(outcome='success').inc(); print('ok')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VALIDATION_VERDICTS Counter", "HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED Counter", "importable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Schema additions (homepage_fallback + analyzed_url)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add per-request opt-out flag and response disclosure field.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/models/schemas.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -c \"from app.models.schemas import DetectionRequest, DetectionResponse; r = DetectionRequest(url='https://example.com/'); print(r.homepage_fallback); resp = DetectionResponse(ok=True, url='https://example.com/', method='langHtml', analyzed_url='https://example.com/'); print(resp.analyzed_url)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["homepage_fallback field added", "analyzed_url field added", "defaults preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: domain_cache.set ttl_override + requested_url field
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DomainCache.set accepts optional ttl_override; persists requested_url field in cached payload for cross-URL HIT awareness.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/domain_fr.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_domain_cache_ttl.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_domain_cache_ttl.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ttl_override kwarg", "TTL override honored", "requested_url persisted", "forward compat for old entries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: routes._detect_single_url orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire validate + homepage fallback. Cache-HIT cross-URL fix. Per-verdict TTL on cache writes.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cache HIT cross-URL sets analyzed_url", "validate after fetch", "homepage fallback hop", "per-verdict TTL", "metrics incremented", "kill switches honored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: /detect-batch + /detect-debug behavior
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire homepage_fallback through batch (default true) and confirm /detect-debug keeps fallback OFF.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/models/schemas.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BatchDetectionRequest.homepage_fallback", "batch passes flag through", "debug fallback OFF", "Pass 2 unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Update CLAUDE.md docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document new behavior, env vars, and method values for future Claude sessions.

